title: limonium delicatulum subsp. angustebracteatum
intro: Limonium delicatulum subsp. angustebracteatum, also known as Statice, is a flowering plant in the Plumbaginaceae family. The plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of using Statice include its potential to improve wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Statice is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it can also be used in herbal creams and ointments for topical applications.
